> Generated for `@gravity-ui/nodekit@2.13.0`

# NodeKit

> A simple toolkit for your Node.js apps, scripts and libraries.
>
> **npm:** `@gravity-ui/nodekit` — check the installed major version in the user's `package.json` and read docs matching it.

## Peer dependencies

Install these in the host project at a compatible version:

| Package | Version range |
| --- | --- |
| `axios` | `^1.7.7` |

## Usage

Add dependency to your project:

```bash
npm install --save @gravity-ui/nodekit
```

And then import and init NodeKit in your application:

```typescript
import {NodeKit} from '@gravity-ui/nodekit';

const nodeKit = new NodeKit();
nodekit.ctx.log('App is ready');
```


> Note: this package's README does not yet have a `## For AI agents` section. See the [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gravity-ui/nodekit/main/README.md) for full documentation.

If the version installed in the project differs, fetch the matching URL instead.
